items.name: Survivorship-cancer
items.description: This AI framework predicts cancer survivorship using clinical healthcare data. The system trains multiple machine learning models, deploying the best performer via a hospital-style dashboard. Medical staff can input patient parameters to receive instant predictions and analytics, transforming complex clinical data into actionable insights.

items.name: agentsciml
items.description: Multi-agent evolutionary framework for automated scientific machine learning discovery

items.name: unified-network-attack-detection
items.description: Machine learning-based unified framework for detecting and analyzing multiple network attack patterns using the CICIDS2017 dataset and Streamlit dashboard.

items.name: metro-delay-prediction
items.description: A machine learning framework to predict Hyderabad Metro train delays using GTFS schedule data, realistic delay simulation, operational insights, and cross-validation on Indian Railways data.

items.name: paxml
items.description: Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

items.name: Volta
items.description: A Rust powered PyTorch-like Machine Learning framework.

items.name: SIRT1_ML_NPASS
items.description: An integrative machine learning, explainable AI, and molecular simulation framework for the discovery of selective SIRT1 inhibitors against Triple Negative Breast Cancer

items.name: Algorith_Project
items.description: BST-based hyperparameter optimization framework with transfer learning analysis across datasets, built using custom data structures and machine learning pipelines.

items.name: Fire-Detection-Using-a-Hybrid-Deep-Learning-and-Machine-Learning-Approach
items.description: Wildfire detection was improved using hybrid deep learning and machine learning models. DenseNet121 + SVM achieved the highest accuracy of 97.98%, followed by InceptionV3 + SVM with 97.87%. The proposed framework provides accurate, reliable, and scalable wildfire detection for real-time monitoring and early warning systems.

items.name: A-Physics-Informed-Framework-for-Hardness-Design-and-Validation-in-Multi-Principal-Element-Alloys
items.description: Physics-informed machine learning framework for hardness prediction in multi-principal element alloys (MPEAs), integrating descriptor engineering, SHAP explainability, inverse alloy design, and FEM-based Vickers indentation validation for reproducible, interpretable, and accelerated alloy discovery.

items.name: mlcolvar
items.description: A unified framework for machine learning collective variables for enhanced sampling simulations

items.name: seaport-eta-hybrid-ml
items.description: A hybrid machine learning framework for high-accuracy prediction of vessels’ Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA) in seaports, integrating Extra Trees, AutoGluon Tabular, and LightGBM with Random Forest Regressor meta-learner, utilizing AIS data from the Baltic Sea.

items.name: ML-From-Scratch
items.description: A comprehensive repository of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, implemented from scratch using NumPy and Python. This project focuses on the underlying mathematical frameworks—including optimization techniques and loss functions—without relying on high-level libraries like Scikit-Learn.

items.name: Triangle-AI
items.description: Triangle AI is a distributed machine learning framework for detecting file-based malware (PDF, SWF, Doc, Html).

items.name: CognitiveEngine
items.description: Cognitive Engine is a modular AI agent framework for building intelligent, decision-driven systems. It combines rule-based logic, machine learning, and large language models (LLMs) to enable adaptable and extensible agents across multiple domains.

items.name: NeuralReceiver
items.description: This repository offers a framework for training machine-learning‑based receivers that operate within the physical layer (PHY) of 5G‑style communication systems. The neural receiver replaces three conventional PHY blocks—channel estimation, equalization, and (optionally) demapping—into a single model.

items.name: ml-slope-stability-laterite
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting monsoon-induced slope failures in lateritic terrain using Monte Carlo data augmentation, PCA, and ensemble methods. Companion code for Geosciences 2026 paper.

items.name: hikari
items.description: Productionized machine learning pipeline and codebase for the HIKARI-HIMARI-MACHI project. Contains the model architecture, training notebooks, and deployment framework for complaint analysis.

items.name: zerfoo

items.name: Explainable-and-Adversarially-Robust-Fake-Job-Detection-using-Machine-Learning
items.description: Machine learning framework for detecting fraudulent job postings using XGBoost, SHAP, and LIME with adversarial robustness evaluation. Includes NLP-based feature engineering, explainable AI, class imbalance handling, and fraud detection analysis using the EMSCAD dataset.

items.name: folax
items.description: Folax (Finite Operator Learning with JAX) is a framework for solving and optimizing PDEs by integrating machine learning with numerical methods in computational mechanics.

items.name: AI-Based-Ethereum-Fraud-Detection-System
items.description: An AI-driven security framework designed to detect fraudulent transactions and malicious activities on the Ethereum blockchain. This project utilizes machine learning models XGBoost and Randome Forest to analyze transaction patterns and identify high-risk addresses with high precision.

items.name: vietnamese-ai

items.name: ML-Based-UAV-Aerodynamic-Prediction-Using-Physics-Informed-Surrogate-Modelling
items.description: Machine learning-based surrogate models offer a faster alternative for preliminary aerodynamic estimation. This project combines aerospace engineering fundamentals with regression-based machine learning techniques to develop a low-cost, physics-informed aerodynamic prediction framework for UAV airfoils operating under low-speed flight conditions.

items.name: ARCO

items.name: CircumSpectrum

It includes RADAR, SOURIS, and CORALIE modules for reaction-level, cross-cohort, and multi-tier correlation analyses.

items.name: Multi-Source-Data-Wheat-Yield-Model
items.description: The model integrates 252,056 field records from 18,004 sites across China to build a multi-source data–driven machine learning framework for wheat yield prediction. Based on this model, N, P, and K fertilization strategies were optimized for agronomic (AOF), economic (EOF), and environmental–social (ESOF) benefits.

Includes ADASYN augmentation, feature engineering, and permutation importance analysis. | B.Tech CSE

items.description: An interpretable machine learning framework using SHAP values for model explainability on loan prediction data. Built with Python, Flask, and XGBoost.

items.description: Detects insider threats using machine learning by analyzing user behavior, system access, and anomalies. Includes simulated logs, anomaly detection models, a combined dashboard, explainability tools, graph analysis, and red team simulation.
